$description: A2UI Craft default theme — base layer (also the Light mode). A neutral palette plus the semantic contract roles (DESIGN.md §13.4) aliased onto it, and the type scale. Mode overlays re-point the color roles onto the same palette; the type scale never changes across modes. The Light values restate the primitives the primitives hardcoded before the contract, so applying this theme in Light mode reproduces today's look.

palette.$description: Primitive ramp. Roles alias into this; overlays override roles, not the ramp.

color.$description: The semantic contract roles (ThemeRoles). Light values.

type.$description: Sizes only in v1 (families/weights are a later phase). Restates the primitives' built-in ramp.
